description_long: This object is a slender, medium-sized bird with a long, downward-curving beak and an elongated tail. Its body is streamlined, with a slightly arched back and a subtle tapering from the head to the tail. The plumage is predominantly dark brown with hints of reddish and grayish tones, giving it a muted, earthy appearance. The beak is thin and distinctly curved, ideal for probing into flowers or crevices. The legs are short and dark, barely visible beneath the body. The overall silhouette is elegant and elongated, with a smooth, continuous line from the beak to the tip of the tail.
description: A slender, dark brown bird with a long, curved beak and an elongated tail, featuring smooth, muted plumage and a streamlined body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's long, curved beak, streamlined body, and extended tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow head, beak curvature, and slim body profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the beak and tail features, with subtle plumage details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tapered tail and rounded body shape.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark brown with subtle gradients and slight reddish undertones
